decisions.why: Created email/phone validation with regex patterns, DOM manipulation helpers, debounce function, reduced motion detection, and error handling utilities for common operations

decisions.what: Implemented scroll reveal animations in animations.js
decisions.why: Used Intersection Observer API with threshold 0.2 and rootMargin for scroll-triggered animations, included stagger timing (150ms), respects prefers-reduced-motion, and includes proper cleanup

decisions.what: Implemented form validation and submission in form.js
decisions.why: Created real-time validation on blur events, email/phone regex validation, loading state management, simulated API call with 2-second timeout, success/error state handling, and form reset after submission

decisions.what: Implemented main entry point in main.js
decisions.why: Initialized smooth scroll for anchor links, mobile menu toggle, button interactions with ripple effects, CTA button handlers, reveal attribute setup, browser compatibility checks, and error handling for module loading

decisions.what: Used IIFE pattern for all modules
decisions.why: Encapsulated code to avoid global namespace pollution and prevent variable conflicts
Included ARIA attributes management, keyboard navigation, focus management, and prefers-reduced-motion support
Added try-catch blocks, console logging with context, and graceful fallbacks for older browsers

decisions.what: Used vanilla JavaScript without external dependencies
decisions.why: Project has no package.json or external libraries available, kept code lightweight and dependency-free
